name: Dr Youkyung Ju-Zaveroni
title: Lecturer in Korean Language (Education)
department: School of Languages, Cultures and Linguistics
expertise_topics: Youkyung's research focuses on digital humanities and pedagogy
and second language acquisition. Her recent work includes aligning Korean with the CEFR for digital language education
discourse analysis of K-pop tweets on X
and corpus-based linguistic studies on narratives surrounding Covid-19 in Korean migrant communities in the UK
as well as disaster management related to the Sewol Ferry Disaster in Korea
research_interests: Youkyung's research focuses on digital humanities and pedagogy, media discourse analysis, and second language acquisition. Her recent work includes aligning Korean with the CEFR for digital language education, discourse analysis of K-pop tweets on X, and corpus-based linguistic studies on narratives surrounding Covid-19 in Korean migrant communities in the UK, as well as disaster management related to the Sewol Ferry Disaster in Korea.
